title: <div>The pricing scheme for the subscription-based model could be as follows:</d
content:
The pricing scheme for the subscription-based model could be as follows:

- Basic Subscription: $9.99 per month, providing access to a limited selection of virtual reality content and basic AI personalization features.
- Premium Subscription: $19.99 per month, offering unlimited access to a wide range of virtual reality experiences, advanced AI personalization, and exclusive content.
- Annual Subscription: $99.99 per year, providing the same benefits as the premium subscription at a discounted rate for long-term commitment.

Additional revenue would be generated through product sales, with virtual reality headsets ranging from $299 to $699, depending on the model and features. Freemium users would have the option to upgrade to a premium subscription for $9.99 per month.
context: From document: An AI-powered virtual reality platform for interactive storytelling… — chunk 3 (chunk 3/3)
